message:
fix(tests): add explicit type annotations to rusqlite query_row calls and apply rustfmt

Add explicit type annotations (String, rusqlite::types::Value) to all
rusqlite query_row calls in the concurrent single-account probe test
to satisfy rustc type inference requirements and prevent ambiguous type
errors when the return type cannot be inferred from surrounding context.

Apply rustfmt to the WAL commit batch callsite in pager.rs and
tighten assert_eq! formatting in the WAL batch helper unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
